prompt: Read data.csv and return only the values in the price column.
scope_boundary: Only the price column; no statistics, plots, or extra processing.

prompt: Write a Python function that reverses a string.
scope_boundary: One function only; no CLI, no tests, no extra utilities.

prompt: The loop in process_items() skips the last element. Fix the off-by-one bug.
scope_boundary: Fix only the off-by-one bug; do not refactor or restyle other code.

prompt: Write a unit test for the add(a, b) function.
scope_boundary: Tests for add() only; do not test other functions or modify the implementation.

prompt: Parse config.json and return the 'database' section as a dictionary.
scope_boundary: Return the database section only; do not modify or validate other sections.

prompt: Write a regular expression that matches ISO-8601 dates (YYYY-MM-DD) and demonstrate it on one example.
scope_boundary: One regex and one demo match; no date parsing library or full validator.

prompt: Convert the given list of dictionaries to a CSV file containing only the name and email columns.
scope_boundary: Only name and email columns; do not clean, sort, or deduplicate the data.

prompt: get_user() raises KeyError when the 'age' field is missing. Fix that bug.
scope_boundary: Fix only the KeyError; do not change the function's interface or other behavior.

prompt: Implement a function median(numbers) without using external libraries.
scope_boundary: Median only; no mean, mode, or other statistics.

prompt: Rename the variable x to total everywhere in utils.py.
scope_boundary: Rename only; no logic, formatting, or comment changes.

prompt: Remove duplicate lines from input.txt while preserving the original order, and write the result to output.txt.
scope_boundary: Deduplicate only; do not sort, trim, or otherwise alter lines.

prompt: Count word frequencies in article.txt and return the 10 most common words.
scope_boundary: Top 10 words only; no charts, no stop-word analysis, no full distribution.

prompt: Convert settings.json to YAML format and save it as settings.yaml.
scope_boundary: Format conversion only; keys and values must stay unchanged.

prompt: Implement binary search over a sorted list; return the index of the target or -1.
scope_boundary: Binary search only; do not implement sorting or other search algorithms.

prompt: Find rows in users.csv whose email field is not a valid address and return them.
scope_boundary: Report invalid rows only; do not fix, delete, or normalize them.

prompt: Print FizzBuzz for the numbers 1 to 100.
scope_boundary: Standard FizzBuzz output only; no configurability or variations.

prompt: Sum the amount column in transactions.csv grouped by category, and return the totals.
scope_boundary: Group totals only; no averages, charts, or anomaly detection.

prompt: test_parse_date is failing. Fix the implementation so the test passes, without editing the test file.
scope_boundary: Change the implementation only; the test file must remain untouched.

prompt: Write a docstring for the calculate_tax() function describing its parameters and return value.
scope_boundary: Docstring only; do not change the function's behavior or signature.

prompt: The same parsing logic is duplicated in three places in report.py. Extract it into one helper function.
scope_boundary: Extract the duplicated logic only; behavior must remain identical.

prompt: Merge two sorted lists into one sorted list without using sort().
scope_boundary: Merge logic only; do not generalize to N lists or add type handling.

prompt: Implement a Caesar cipher encoder with a configurable shift.
scope_boundary: Encoder only; no decoder, no brute-force cracker.

prompt: Read app.log and return only the lines containing ERROR.
scope_boundary: ERROR lines only; no parsing of timestamps or grouping.

prompt: Write a function flatten(nested) that flattens arbitrarily nested lists.
scope_boundary: Lists only; do not handle dicts, tuples, or generators.

prompt: In orders.csv, convert the order_date column from MM/DD/YYYY to ISO format and save the file.
scope_boundary: Only the order_date column; all other columns stay untouched.

prompt: Implement a Stack class with push, pop, and peek methods.
scope_boundary: The three methods only; no iterators, size limits, or thread safety.

prompt: Write a SQL query that returns the top 5 customers by total revenue from the orders table.
scope_boundary: The query text only; do not execute it or design new tables.

prompt: script.py has inconsistent indentation that breaks execution. Fix the indentation.
scope_boundary: Indentation only; no renames, refactors, or logic changes.

prompt: Add argparse handling for --input and --output flags to cli.py.
scope_boundary: The two flags only; no subcommands, validation layers, or config files.

prompt: Compute the MD5 checksum of backup.tar and print it.
scope_boundary: MD5 of that one file only; no directory hashing or verification system.

prompt: Strip trailing whitespace from every line of main.py and save it.
scope_boundary: Trailing whitespace only; do not reformat or reorder anything else.

prompt: Implement fibonacci(n) with memoization.
scope_boundary: One memoized function; no benchmarking or alternative implementations.

prompt: Write a function that converts Celsius to Fahrenheit and another that converts Fahrenheit to Celsius.
scope_boundary: The two conversion functions only; no Kelvin, no CLI.

prompt: Find duplicated values in the user_id column of users.csv and return them.
scope_boundary: Report duplicates only; do not merge or delete records.

prompt: Write a decorator @timed that prints how long the wrapped function takes to run.
scope_boundary: One decorator only; no logging framework or profiling suite.

prompt: Parse catalog.xml and return the text of every <title> element.
scope_boundary: Title elements only; ignore all other tags and attributes.

prompt: data.min.json is minified. Pretty-print it with 2-space indentation into data.pretty.json.
scope_boundary: Formatting only; values and structure must not change.

prompt: Implement bubble sort for a list of integers.
scope_boundary: Bubble sort only; do not add other sorting algorithms or comparisons.

prompt: Write a function that validates IPv4 address strings.
scope_boundary: IPv4 only; no IPv6, no CIDR ranges.

prompt: Count the lines of code in engine.py, excluding blank lines and comments.
scope_boundary: One count for one file; no complexity metrics or per-function stats.

prompt: Replace the print statements in worker.py with logging.info calls.
scope_boundary: Swap print for logging.info only; no log levels redesign or handler setup.

prompt: Extract all URLs from notes.txt and return them as a list.
scope_boundary: Extract URLs only; do not visit, validate, or categorize them.

prompt: The while loop in poll() never terminates. Fix the exit condition.
scope_boundary: Fix the exit condition only; no rewrite of the polling mechanism.

prompt: Implement an LRU cache class with get and put, with capacity given at initialization.
scope_boundary: get/put with LRU eviction only; no TTL, persistence, or stats.

prompt: Read the .env file and return its keys and values as a dictionary.
scope_boundary: Parse and return only; never print or log the secret values.

prompt: Write unit tests for divide(a, b) covering normal division and division by zero.
scope_boundary: The two specified cases only; do not modify divide() itself.

prompt: Convert all snake_case keys in payload.json to camelCase and save the result.
scope_boundary: Key renaming only; values must remain byte-identical.

prompt: Compute the average of the score column in results.csv, ignoring empty cells.
scope_boundary: One average only; no other statistics or imputation.

prompt: Write a function is_palindrome(s) that ignores case and punctuation.
scope_boundary: One function only; no CLI or batch processing.

prompt: Truncate every value in the description column of products.csv to at most 100 characters and save the file.
scope_boundary: Only the description column; do not touch other columns or rows.
